Set catchability for a single fleet-species metier

Source: R/tune_fleets.R
set_metier_catchability.Rd

Assigns scalar catchability to a metier, rescales its spatial catchability vector to have the correct mean, and rebuilds vul_p_a. Catchability is enforced to lie in (0, 1).

Usage

set_metier_catchability(metier, q_value, use_link = FALSE)

Arguments

metier

A Metier R6 object (modified in place via R6 reference semantics).

q_value

Numeric. Target scalar catchability. Must be in [0, 1] when use_link = FALSE. When use_link = TRUE, any non-negative value is accepted and mapped to (0, 1) via q_link.

use_link

Logical. If TRUE, applies q_link to map q_value from the positive reals into (0, 1). Use during numerical optimisation to ensure smooth gradients. Default FALSE.

Value

The modified metier, invisibly.

On this page
